title: Trophoblast Organoid Media (TOM)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"bu0mi","text":"Media is also used with flipped TOs. Media can be stored at 4C and used within 1 month.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In a 50 mL conical add 40 mL of F12/DMEM. Mix in the following components:
B27 1 mL stock is 10X, final is 1X supplier: ThermoFisher (Gibco), cat#: 17504044
N-Acetyl-L-Cystine (NAC) 625 µL stock is 100 mM in H 2 0, final is 1.25 mM supplier: Sigma, cat#: A9165
N2 500 µL stock is 10X, final is 1X supplier: ThermoFisher (Gibco), cat#: 17502048
L-Glutamine 500 µL stock is 200 mM, final is 200 mM supplier: ThermoFisher (Gibco), cat#: A2916801
Nicotinamide (NTM) 500 µL stock is 1 M in H 2 0, final is 10 mM supplier: Sigma-Aldrich, cat#: N0636
Primocin 100 µL stock is 50 mg/ml, final is 100 µg/ml supplier: Inviogen, cat #: NC9141851
Y-27632 100 µL stock is 2.5 mM in H 2 0, final is 5 µM
hEGF 25 µL stock is 100 µg/ml in H 2 0, final is 50 ng/ml supplier: Peprotech, cat#: AF-100-15
hFGF2 25 µL stock is 200 µg/ml in 5mM Tris pH 7.6, final is 100 µg/ml supplier: Peprotech, cat#: 100-18C
hHGF 25 µL stock is 100 µg/ml in H 2 0, final is 50 ng/ml supplier: Peprotech, cat#: 100-39
R-spondin1 25 µL stock is 160 µg/ml in PBS+0.1% BSA, final is 80 µg/ml supplier: Bio-techne, cat#: 4645-RS
PGE2 25 µL stock is 5 mM in acetone, final is 2.5 µM supplier: Sigma, cat#: P0409
A83-01 5 µL stock is 5 mM in DMSO, final is 500 nM supplier: Tocris, cat#: 2939
CHIR99021 5 µL stock is 15 mM in DMSO, final is 1.5 µl supplier: Tocris, cat#: 4423
FBS 5 mL supplier: Cytiva, cat# SH30088.03HI
creator: vfarmer Farmer
